schedules.title: Memory curation
schedules.prompt: Curate recent archived chats, memory proposals, and durable learnings. Use the memory agent. Prefer existing session-insights sections and update the configured vault. Append durable learnings to the vault's Workspace/Learnings.md using the format `[YYYY-MM-DD] category: one-liner — confidence: high/medium/low`; capture error resolutions, non-obvious workarounds, user corrections, and outdated assumptions. Do not log routine work. Report only processed counts plus changed files.

schedules.title: Skill evolution
schedules.prompt: Run the skill-evolution maintenance pipeline with the configured model. Surface generated proposals and any failed gates. Do not apply proposals automatically.

schedules.title: Runtime error triage
schedules.prompt:
Triage this instance's runtime issue report below. If it says no issues, reply with a one-line all-clear and stop. Otherwise: group the entries by root cause, note frequency and impact, then investigate the top causes in the app and workspace code. Apply concrete low-risk fixes directly and report anything riskier for user approval. The error log is cleared after this run, so include enough context from it in your report.

{{ISSUE_REPORT}}

schedules.title: Weekly self-improvement review
schedules.prompt: Run the weekly self-improvement checklist from the packaged weekly-review-template.md asset (locate it with: python3 -c "from importlib import resources; print(resources.files('ciao.stock').joinpath('schedules/weekly-review-template.md'))"). Apply concrete low-risk local fixes and report anything that needs user approval.
